name: @pryzm/plugin-grid
description: PRYZM 2 — Grid plugin (S12-T4). Headless half: Store<GridData>, typed errors, 4 handlers (CreateGrid / DeleteGrid / SetGridSpacing / SetGridExtent). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/grid.ts) emits a flat ribbon-mesh BufferGeometryDescriptor (linear + arc lines, label glyphs deferred). Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
